---
title: 'Blogs'
subtitle: 'Thoughts, exploration, and knowhow notes.'
sidebar: false
toc: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
reading-meta-enabled: false

listing:
    id: blogs-listing
    contents: "*/index.*md"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    fields: [image, title, categories, author, date]
    grid-columns: 2
    image-height: "12rem"
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pinn32/img/main/placeholders/Blog.png'
    sort: 
        - "date desc"
        - "title asc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 20
---
